markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy, process, and upcoming deliverables.](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content production is paused** until Monday's PMM meeting to gather direct feedback and resolve process issues.](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)
  - [**A new "agentic" AI pipeline** is live, using self-correction and the more powerful EXA search API to improve draft quality and accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [**A separate "Product Accuracy" artifact will be created** to prevent AI from making false claims and reduce internal review time.](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=1377.0)
  - [**Blog strategy will shift** from "What is" definitions to thought leadership, moving educational content to a dedicated directory.](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)

## Topics

### PMM Feedback & Monday's Meeting

  - [A blog "missed the mark" because PMMs had not filled out the Notion documentation.](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
  - [The upcoming Monday meeting will address this by:](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
      - [Reviewing existing feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
      - [Re-reviewing the Notion docs to clarify input requirements.](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
      - [Showcasing the new agentic pipeline to demonstrate process improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)

### New "Agentic" AI Pipeline

  - [A new content generation pipeline is now active, designed to improve quality and accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [**Key Features:**](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
      - [**Self-Correction:** An agent grades its own draft against artifacts (personas, guidelines) and revises to fix errors.](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
      - [**Advanced Fact-Checking:** Replaced Perplexity with EXA, a more powerful search API.](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [**Initial Results:** One test article showed improved flow and overall quality.](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)

### Blog Strategy: "What Is" Sections

  - [**Decision:** Remove "What is" H2s from blogs.](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [**Rationale:**](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
      - [Blogs will focus on thought leadership and specific questions.](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
      - [Educational content will move to a dedicated directory.](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
      - [This targets higher-quality, consideration-stage traffic over general, top-of-funnel clicks.](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [**Implementation:** Use the intro for a brief definition, then start with a more specific H2.](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)

### Content Strategy & Topic Approval

  - [**Problem:** N-able was approving individual topics without a clear strategic context.](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)
  - [**Solution:** N-able will review the master **Content Strategy Doc** first.](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)
      - [This document defines the core themes and topic clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
      - [Feedback on the doc will guide future keyword research and topic generation.](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)
  - [**Action:** N-able will pause all topic approvals until the strategy doc review is complete.](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)

### Product Accuracy & Feedback Loop

  - [**Problem:** PMMs need a clear feedback loop to ensure their specific product language and accuracy notes are incorporated.](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)
  - [**Issue:** Product mentions were sometimes removed from drafts, making it unclear if feedback was applied.](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)
  - [**Solution:** Create a separate **"Product Accuracy" artifact**.](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=1377.0)
      - [This artifact will contain specific rules and guidelines for all product mentions.](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=1377.0)
      - [It will be integrated as a dedicated step in the agentic pipeline, preventing AI from making false claims.](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=1377.0)
      - [GrowthX has prior experience with this for a client in the healthcare supplement space.](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=1524.0)

### Proposed Gated Asset: AI Threat Detection

  - [GrowthX proposed a gated asset for lead generation: **"How SMBs Can Improve AI Threat Detection."**](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
  - [**Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
    1.  [**Setting the Threats:** Repurposes annual threat report data (voice clone, synthetic video, etc.).](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
    2.  [**Detection Framework:** Expands on a brief table from the report into a full narrative.](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
    3.  [**Implementation:** Details how to apply the framework, including where to position N-able solutions (e.g., Add Lumen MDR).](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)
  - [**Status:** The asset can replace weekly articles under the standard contract. The outline is ready for PMM review, especially with security PMM Jen.](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)

### SEO Feedback

  - [**Internal Links:** Fix broken links (e.g., anchor text "MSP owners" linking to "incident response best practices").](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=1630.0)
  - [**Content Variety:** Vary opening stats across cyber resilience articles (e.g., stop reusing the "4.4 million" stat).](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=1666.0)
  - [**AI Overviews:** To optimize for generative AI, GrowthX uses practices like:](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)
      - ["Bottom line up front" writing.](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=1729.0)
      - [One thought per sentence/paragraph.](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=1729.0)
      - [FAQs and bulleted summaries.](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=1768.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
      - [Pause content production until Monday's PMM meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)
      - [File a Linear ticket for the "Product Accuracy" artifact.](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=1505.0)
      - [Update company context and persona artifacts with existing feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
      - [Share the gated asset outline with the PMM team on Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
      - [Correct internal links and vary opening stats in future articles.](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=1630.0)
  - [**N-able:**](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
      - [Pause all topic approvals.](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
      - [Schedule an internal meeting to review the master Content Strategy Doc.](https://fathom.video/share/8K6D_hNgLEy1LyRLNBLkh33B8T5Q1ns8?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
